title: Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam
tagline: Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Agasteeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Kolapakkam, a suburb of Chennai, India.
overview.description: Agasteeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Kolapakkam, a suburb of Chennai, India. While the presiding deity is Shiva, there are shrines for the Navagrahas or nine planets within the temple complex. The Hindu sage Agastya is believed to have worshipped Shiva at this place.

topPlaces.name: Kolapakkam
topPlaces.description: Kolapakkam is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Kolapakkam is located at an altitude of about 42 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 13.0101°N 80.1492°E / 13.0101; 80.1492.

topPlaces.name: Gerugambakkam
topPlaces.description: Gerugambakkam is a residential-industrial neighborhood in the South-Western part of Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.It belongs to the Kundrathur taluk of Kanchipuram District, Tamil Nadu, India. It forms a suburb of Chennai city.

topPlaces.name: Moulivakkam
topPlaces.description: Moulivakkam is a neighbourhood of Chennai. It is situated 18 km south-west of Chennai on the Arcot Road.

topPlaces.name: 2014 Chennai building collapse
topPlaces.description: On 28 June 2014, an eleven-storey apartment block collapsed while under construction at Moulivakkam in the suburb of Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The cause was determined to be a lightning strike to exposed metal at the top, which was conducted through the building and to ground via reinforcement bars embedded in the concrete, which led to failure of support columns and subsequent collapse of the structure.

topPlaces.name: Mugalivakkam
topPlaces.description: Mugalivakkam is a neighbourhood of Chennai. It is located in Sriperumbudur taluk of Kanchipuram district, in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Periyapanicheri
topPlaces.description: Periyapanicheri is a village in Kanchipuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the eastern part of Kancheepuram district, about 25 kilometres east of the taluk seat Sriperumbudur and 68 kilometres northeast of the district seat Kanchipuram.

topPlaces.name: Ramanatheswarar Temple, Porur
topPlaces.description: Porur Ramanatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the neighbourhood of Porur in Chennai, India. The temple was built during the Chola period.

topPlaces.name: Porur Lake
topPlaces.description: Porur Lake is located on the fringes of the Porur neighbourhood in south-west Chennai and is a primary water resource for the residents of Chennai. It is a temporary catchment area connected with Chembarambakkam Lake.

items.note: Kolapakkam is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Kolapakkam is located at an altitude of about 42 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 13.0101°N 80.1492°E / 13.0101; 80.1492.

Gerugambakkam is a residential-industrial neighborhood in the South-Western part of Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India.It belongs to the Kundrathur taluk of Kanchipuram District, Tamil Nadu, India. It forms a suburb of Chennai city.
Moulivakkam is a neighbourhood of Chennai. It is situated 18 km south-west of Chennai on the Arcot Road.

On 28 June 2014, an eleven-storey apartment block collapsed while under construction at Moulivakkam in the suburb of Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The cause was determined to be a lightning strike to exposed metal at the top, which was conducted through the building and to ground via reinforcement bars embedded in the concrete, which led to failure of support columns and subsequent collapse of the structure.
Mugalivakkam is a neighbourhood of Chennai. It is located in Sriperumbudur taluk of Kanchipuram district, in Tamil Nadu.

Periyapanicheri is a village in Kanchipuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the eastern part of Kancheepuram district, about 25 kilometres east of the taluk seat Sriperumbudur and 68 kilometres northeast of the district seat Kanchipuram.
Porur Ramanatheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the neighbourhood of Porur in Chennai, India. The temple was built during the Chola period.

Porur Lake is located on the fringes of the Porur neighbourhood in south-west Chennai and is a primary water resource for the residents of Chennai. It is a temporary catchment area connected with Chembarambakkam Lake.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (16 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam?
faq.a: Stays in Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Agasteeswarar Temple, Kolapakkam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kolapakkam, Gerugambakkam, Moulivakkam, 2014 Chennai building collapse, Mugalivakkam.
